title: comandra umbellata var. californica
intro: Comandra umbellata var. californica, also known as California comandra or bearberry, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of saponins and tannins. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems, and has also been used as a treatment for fever and respiratory infections. Comandra umbellata var. californica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
